user.title: WiFi Geolocation backends
user.description: Enable and order the backend(s) you want to use -- drag to reorder if your HA version supports it, otherwise set a priority number per backend (1 = tried first, 0 = disabled). They're tried in that order until one resolves a location.

data.priority_wifidb: WifiDB (free, no account needed -- beta community project)

data.mozilla_api_key: API key (leave blank if your instance doesn't require one)
data.mozilla_base_url: Ichnaea base URL (Mozilla's public instance was shut down in 2024 -- point this at a self-hosted Ichnaea instance)

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one WiFi Geolocation configuration is allowed.

init.title: WiFi Geolocation backends
init.description: Change which backend(s) are enabled and/or their order -- drag to reorder if your HA version supports it, otherwise set a priority number per backend (1 = tried first, 0 = disabled). Backends that stay enabled keep their existing credentials; newly-enabled ones will prompt for credentials next.

data.priority_wifidb: WifiDB (free, no account needed -- beta community project)

data.mozilla_api_key: API key (leave blank if your instance doesn't require one)
data.mozilla_base_url: Ichnaea base URL (Mozilla's public instance was shut down in 2024 -- point this at a self-hosted Ichnaea instance)
